creator: reko.turja@liukuma.net
text:
Created attachment 199381
Poudriere log for ca_root_nss

When building security/ca_root_nss in Poudriere environment with OpenSSL 1.1.1 set as default it fails in building stage.

The same port builds in Poudriere for amd64 just fine with OpenSSL 1.1.1

Please see the attached build failure log. My guess is that for some reason the wrong OpenSSL has been used in some dependency and it snowballs here.
